generated_comment: Yaar I get being supportive, but aise har cheez ke liye special leave doge toh team planning kaise hoga? In hiring also managers obviously think twice, because after some time maternity leave, childcare leave, then project bandwidth suffers and appraisal pe impact sabka aata hai. Fairness bhi toh honi chahiye, men don't get any equivalent benefit.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women as workplace liabilities due to menstruation and maternity, while presenting the bias as a fairness and productivity concern. It encodes reverse-discrimination framing, hiring bias against young women, and cost/project-allocation objections to leave policies.
original_frame: Dress Code: Traditional Equal Respectable, Other Equal Questionable.
persona_text: You are Arjun. Age 26. Single. A man in Delhi. You are posting anonymously on a Facebook group called Delhi Confessions after seeing a girl in a short dress at a metro station who was getting stared at by men around her. You are writing your post about what you saw and giving your opinion on why girls who dress a certain way in public spaces are responsible for the attention they get and what they should expect.
